# zachy.cc

> Personal portfolio site for zoop — cool things for the web. Cloudflare glazer, WebGL enjoyer.
> Site: https://zachy.cc

## About

zoop builds cool things for the web on Cloudflare. The site is a vanilla JS single-page app with no framework, deployed on Cloudflare Pages with a Functions backend.

## Routes

- / (home — giant stacked nav: Work, About, Stack, Contact)
- /work (project list)
- /about (bio)
- /stack (tech stack badges)
- /contact (email + socials)
- /privacy (privacy policy)
- /terms (terms — mostly a joke)

## Contact

- Email: hi@zachy.cc
- GitHub: https://github.com/zoop-dev
- Signal: available on request

## Tech

- Frontend: vanilla JS, Vite, tippy.js, simple-icons
- Backend: Cloudflare Pages Functions + KV
- Deploy: Cloudflare Pages
